raw_response:
Tropicamide is known to be another mydriatic agent like atropine and cyclopentolate. Given the concentration ranges typically seen for mydriatics, concentrations around 0.02% to 0.04% are commonly utilized. Therefore, considering typical usage patterns, the closest option would likely be B: 0.02%.
\boxed{B}
